sglang.title: [fix] fix dsv3 weight loader tqdm and simplify shared experts fusion
sglang.author: Alcanderian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Using weights = [w for w in weights_list if w[0] not in names_to_remove] to update weights will change it from async weight iterator to a list. Thats will make the tqdm looks very fast but the weight are still loading in the backround. Making the progress bar confusing.
acc
python3 benchm

Simplify the verify function.

vllm.title: [Hardware][NVIDIA][kernel] Fp4 MOE quant kernel optimization
vllm.author: jiahanc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Optimize FP4 Quant Kernel in MOE performance on NVIDIA Blackwell GPU

Use grid stride layout instead of reach block process 1 row to have better parallelism.
If grid size < num of SMs and block size large enough, double grid size and half block size for better parallelism.
For small problem

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Don't attempt to use triton if no driver is active
vllm.author: kzawora-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Platforms can have triton package installed by external packages (e.g. xgrammar), even if it's unsupported by them and not specified in vLLM requirements. This patch adds additional triton check and prevents non-GPU platforms from autotuning triton flash attention kernels when the package is install

vllm.title: [Perf] Further tunings for SM100 FP8 CUTLASS kernel
vllm.author: ilmarkov
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Additional performance optimizations after #18778
Tune CUTLASS configs for M >= 128.
For Llama 8B on B200, these tunings offer a GEMM improvement of:

1.13 to 1.32x speedup for M= 128
up to 1.4x speedup for M=256
up to 1.2x speedup for M>=512

Kernel benchmarks using #17126 on B200.
python benchmark
